# Import data

## From packages


::: {.cell hash='aula3_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-1_78ddaacde7fd58cf923ef3d8b0c73a9a'}

```{.r .cell-code}
cars2 <- cars
speed <- cars2$speed
speed
```

## From Excel


::: {.cell hash='aula3_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-3_bd45fedad8f074fc1d5d7c61e1c33540'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(readxl)
magnesio <- read_excel("dados-diversos.xlsx")
escala1 <- read_excel("dados-diversos.xlsx", "escala")
escala2 <- read_excel("dados-diversos.xlsx", 2)
```
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
library(tidyverse)
```
